blocks.text: Match preview: Indonesia Women face Oman Women in 4th Quarter final (T20) on Wed, 10 Jun, 2026, 11:30 am at YSD-UKM Cricket Oval Bangi. Full pitch report, weather forecast, and squad details below.
Standard T20 surface expected. Conditions will be clearer at the toss — monitor team selection and dew factor for night games.
Expected par score: 160–180 runs par score.
Variable conditions · High 30°C / Low 23°C · Rain: 5.8 mm · Wind: up to 15 km/h. Rain likely — DLS may apply; favour bowlers who hit the deck and teams with depth.
International playing XI is announced at the toss. Check back on match day for confirmed line-ups.
